title: OP Pickaxe
description: Adds a pickaxe that's just INSTANT MINING
body:
This mod adds a pickaxe that just insta-mines blocks. Also it cannot be crafted in surival, **it's too op**. You can also insta-kill with it.

## Why?
Because yes.

## Why is this description so bad?
idk

But its actually satisfying, and it's unbreakable, and the bedrock version, while not working with all blocks, does work with stone so here I guess: [https://github.com/TheCoolDork/OP-Pickaxe/tree/1.21.1neoforge](https://github.com/TheCoolDork/OP-Pickaxe/tree/1.21.1neoforge)
